subcodes.first_line: The pure essence of praise and the quintessence of laudation beseemeth the most holy court of the Desired One, Who hath brought forth all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساذج حمد و جوهر ثنا ساحت قرب قدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که جمیع آفرینش
subcodes.subjects: @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
